member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.Status
member.summary: Represents the conversion state of a render pipeline converter item.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.Status.Pending
member.summary: The item is waiting to be processed.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.Status.Warning
member.summary: The item has a potential issue that may require attention.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.Status.Error
member.summary: The item encountered an error during processing.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.Status.Success
member.summary: The item was successfully processed without issues.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter
member.summary: Represents a converter that processes render pipeline conversion items.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.isEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the converter is enabled and can be used.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.isDisabledMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the reason message shown when the converter item is disabled.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.Scan(System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem}})
member.summary: Scans for available render pipeline converter items.
member.param: A callback invoked when the scan is complete, providing the list of converter items.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.BeforeConvert
member.summary: Called before the conversion process begins.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.Convert(UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem,System.String@)
member.summary: Performs the conversion on a given converter item.
member.param: The converter item to be processed.
An output message providing additional details about the conversion result.
member.returns: A value representing the outcome of the conversion.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverter.AfterConvert
member.summary: Called after the conversion process is completed.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem
member.summary: Represents a converter item used within a render pipeline conversion process.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem.name
member.summary: Gets the display name of the converter item.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem.info
member.summary: Gets a description or additional information about the converter item.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem.isEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the converter item is enabled.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem.isDisabledMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the reason message shown when the converter item is disabled.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.IRenderPipelineConverterItem.OnClicked
member.summary: Invoked when the converter item is clicked or activated.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.Converter.RenderPipelineConverterMaterialUpgrader.upgraders
member.summary: List of material upgraders to use for this converter.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.RenderPipelines.Core.AssetCreationUtil.CreateShaderAndMaterial(System.String,System.Action{UnityEngine.Material},System.String)
member.summary: Prompts the user to save a new asset created from the shader template, and creates and with it.
member.param: A delegate (callback) that will be invoked with the .
Path of the Shader Template file.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.RenderPipelines.Core.AssetCreationUtil.CreateMaterial(System.String,System.Action{UnityEngine.Material},UnityEngine.Shader)
member.summary: Prompts the user to save a new asset created using the .
member.param: A delegate (callback) that will be invoked with the .
